projectDescription: A Claude Code skill for comprehensive paid advertising audits and optimization across Google, Meta, YouTube, LinkedIn, TikTok, Microsoft, and Apple Ads with 250+ weighted checks, parallel agents, industry templates, and AI creative generation.
keyFeatures: 250+ audit checks across 7 ad platforms (Google, Meta, YouTube, LinkedIn, TikTok, Microsoft, Apple)
Parallel subagent delegation for full multi-platform audits
Ads Health Score (0-100) with weighted severity scoring algorithm
12 industry-specific templates (SaaS, ecommerce, local service, B2B, healthcare, finance, and more)
AI creative pipeline: brand DNA extraction, campaign brief, image generation, product photography
PPC financial calculator (CPA, ROAS, break-even, LTV:CAC, budget forecasting)
A/B test design with statistical significance and sample size calculations
PDF audit report generation for client deliverables
MCP server integration for live ad platform API access
Privacy-first: all analysis runs locally, no data sent to external servers
